policy.note: This guard validates the post-owner activation queue. It does not execute queue steps or inspect private sources.

findings.message: Queue status must be ready.
Queue must be queue-only.
Queue must not record decisions.
Queue must not mutate the decision session.
Queue must not read private content.
Queue must not copy private content.
Queue must not run private inventory now.
Queue must not write public files.
Queue must not write public manifests.
Queue public-ready after queue must be 0.
Queue summary public-ready must be 0.
Summary queue_steps must match step rows.
Summary executable_now must match step rows.
Summary blocked_now must match step rows.
Queue internal failures must be 0.
Pending decision must not be activation-ready.
Pending decision must keep executable_now at 0.
Pending decision must keep all queue steps blocked.
Queue steps must be an array.
Queue must contain the expected seven steps.
Step 1 must be record_owner_decision.
Step 2 must be decision_session_check.
Step 3 must be blocker_refresh.
Step 4 must be activation_preflight.
Step 5 must be private_metadata_inventory.
Step 6 must be private_metadata_inventory_check.
Step 7 must be day_batch_loop.
record_owner_decision must include a phase.
record_owner_decision must include a command.
record_owner_decision must include requires array.
record_owner_decision must explain why it is blocked.
record_owner_decision command must stay in the safe queue command set.
decision_session_check must include a phase.
decision_session_check must include a command.
decision_session_check must include requires array.
decision_session_check must explain why it is blocked.
decision_session_check command must stay in the safe queue command set.
blocker_refresh must include a phase.
blocker_refresh must include a command.
blocker_refresh must include requires array.
blocker_refresh must explain why it is blocked.
blocker_refresh command must stay in the safe queue command set.
activation_preflight must include a phase.
activation_preflight must include a command.
activation_preflight must include requires array.
activation_preflight must explain why it is blocked.
activation_preflight command must stay in the safe queue command set.
private_metadata_inventory must include a phase.
private_metadata_inventory must include a command.
private_metadata_inventory must include requires array.
private_metadata_inventory must explain why it is blocked.
private_metadata_inventory command must stay in the safe queue command set.
Private metadata inventory may be executable only when activation_ready is true.
private_metadata_inventory_check must include a phase.
private_metadata_inventory_check must include a command.
private_metadata_inventory_check must include requires array.
private_metadata_inventory_check must explain why it is blocked.
private_metadata_inventory_check command must stay in the safe queue command set.
day_batch_loop must include a phase.
day_batch_loop must include a command.
day_batch_loop must include requires array.
day_batch_loop must explain why it is blocked.
day_batch_loop command must stay in the safe queue command set.
Queue must include hard stops.
Hard stops must block private OCR/PDF extraction.
Hard stops must block copying private files into Git.
Hard stops must block local LLM private-content work before activation.
Hard stops must keep public-ready blocked.

next_actions: Use the queue as the only safe post-owner source-root activation order.
Keep all queue steps blocked until an explicit owner-confirmed source-root decision is recorded.
Rerun this guard after changing queue policy, step order or activation preflight logic.
